creator: net@arrishq.net
text:
Wmconfig port update to version 1.2.7
 
> How-To-Repeat:
 
> Fix:
 
 --- log begins here ---
 diff -ruN wmconfig_old/Makefile wmconfig/Makefile
 --- wmconfig_old/Makefile       Sat Oct 14 10:12:26 2006
 +++ wmconfig/Makefile   Thu Oct 19 18:09:40 2006
 @@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
   #
 
   PORTNAME=3D      wmconfig
 -PORTVERSION=3D   1.2.6
 +PORTVERSION=3D   1.2.7
   CATEGORIES=3D    x11-wm
   MASTER_SITES=3D  http://www.arrishq.net/downloads/
 
 diff -ruN wmconfig_old/distinfo wmconfig/distinfo
 --- wmconfig_old/distinfo       Sat Oct 14 10:12:26 2006
 +++ wmconfig/distinfo   Thu Oct 19 18:10:35 2006
 @@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
 -MD5 (wmconfig-1.2.6.tar.bz2) =3D 68581fba91953670315b2f29189d063b
 -SHA256 (wmconfig-1.2.6.tar.bz2) =3D =20
 9ba2a7beb24f24eccd7e051f15160fd53ced6d3a4b93c
 928c818bb21b6c12829
 -SIZE (wmconfig-1.2.6.tar.bz2) =3D 125246
 +SHA256 (wmconfig-1.2.7.tar.bz2) =3D =20
 4f8eedab59ba9314069584226c59daf0f33bc1f123fce
 e2c4e1d07047e3f4a2b
 +MD5 (wmconfig-1.2.7.tar.bz2) =3D 50d95ec10dc8aa283fa2aec422e6db02
 +SIZE (wmconfig-1.2.7.tar.bz2) =3D 125620
 --- log ends here ---
